commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fe51174b80550ac9c8a1a98a7946edb20a765ae6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds provider allowlisting to `openclaw models list` row construction for `models.mode: "replace"`, passes a browse bypass for explicit `--all`/provider-filtered paths, and adds row-builder tests.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +116. Total +143 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's default `models list` path appends authenticated catalog rows without a replace-mode gate, and the canonical issue includes concrete leaked-provider output. I did not run a live CLI reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor follow-up is needed because automation cannot supply the external contributor's real CLI proof, and maintainers still need to choose one canonical same-root fix after the type failure is repaired.

target.title: fix(models): filter models list by configured providers in replace mode [AI-assisted]
target.body:
��### Summary
This PR fixes an issue where the output of `openclaw models list` is not filtered when `models.mode: "replace"` is configured with a restricted list of providers.

### Changes
- Implemented `isProviderAllowed` helper in `src/commands/models/list.rows.ts` to check if a provider is allowed under the current `models.mode` config.
- Updated `matchesRowFilter` and `appendConfiguredRows` to filter out model rows for providers not explicitly present in `models.providers` when `models.mode` is set to `"replace"`.
- Added unit tests in `src/commands/models/list.rows.test.ts` to verify filtering behavior.

### Real behavior proof
Below is the output of the unit test verification:
```
 �^C��  commands  ../../src/commands/models/list.rows.test.ts (5 tests) 5565ms
     �^C�� can skip runtime model-suppression hooks for provider-catalog fast paths  1865ms
     �^C�� applies manifest suppression when runtime model-suppression hooks are skipped  756ms
     �^C�� uses Codex auth availability for configured canonical OpenAI rows  757ms
     �^C�� filters out providers not in models.providers when mode is replace  1442ms
     �^C�� keeps provider normalization for configured provider models  723ms
```



## Test Proof
Verified that the unit tests pass on Windows and that the \ rowse\ bypass correctly preserves the explicit browse contract (e.g. \models list --all\) while preventing configured provider leaks in replace mode. All 6 tests in \list.rows.test.ts\ pass.
target.author: aniruddhaadak80
